basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Study Coordinator Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years; OBC: 3 years; PwBD General: 10 years; PwBD OBC: 13 years; PwBD SC/ST: 15 years

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Biological Sciences/Biomedical Sciences from a recognized University and One year experience in the relevant field
qualification.details: PhD in Biological Sciences/Biomedical Sciences from a recognized University and One year experience in the relevant field. Desirable: Minimum three publications in indexed journals with good impact factor; Experience in clinical research projects/data management; Sound computer knowledge and statistical software handling; Experience in multicentric/extramural projects will be preferred.

selection_process: Interview Written Test (if number of eligible candidates more than 30)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Rajkot Study Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Study Coordinator post at AIIMS Rajkot?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Study Coordinator position at AIIMS Rajkot is 24th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Study Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Biological Sciences or Biomedical Sciences from a recognized university, along with at least one year of relevant experience. Desirable qualifications are also listed.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Study Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Study Coordinator post is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Study Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. A written test may be conducted if the number of eligible candidates exceeds thirty.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Study Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Study Coordinator position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 100,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the Study Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The application process is to be done via email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address provided.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of your educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Rajkot for the Study Coordinator position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
